Pregnancy Test - Clearblue Rapid Detection Value Pack, Result As Fast As 1 Minute, Kit Of 3 Tests

Clearblue Rapid Detection Pregnancy Test can give you a ‘Pregnant’ result as fast as 1 minute when testing from the day of your missed period. You should wait 3 minutes to confirm a ‘Not Pregnant’ result. It is designed to be the easiest to use home pregnancy test, with an extra wide colour-changing tip and ergonomic curved handle. With the accuracy you expect from Clearblue, this home pregnancy test kit is over 99% accurate from the day you expect your period. In a UK study, over 9 in 10 women said they would pay more for Clearblue Rapid Detection than a strip test (based on 111 women using and reading different test types).
For more information on this product or answers to your questions, our Careline advisors are available for you 4pm – 12 midnight Winter, 6pm – 2am Summer, AET, (may vary due to daylight saving), Mon - Fri except on bank holidays.

Clearblue Digital Ovulation And Pregnancy Test – Find Your 2 Peak Days, 10 Digital Ovulation Tests And Ultra Early Pregnancy Test, Try The FREE Cycle Tracking App

Great value pack if you are trying for a baby: contains 10 Clearblue Digital Ovulation Tests and 1 Clearblue Ultra Early Pregnancy Test. You can also track your cycles in our FREE app, designed for use with Clearblue Advanced Digital or Digital Ovulation Tests. This simple at home ovulation kit is proven to help you get pregnant, by accurately pinpointing your 2 best days to get pregnant each cycle. The ovulation stick shows a clear smiley face on the digital display when your LH surge has been detected, so you know that today and tomorrow are your best 2 days to try for a baby. When trying to get pregnant it’s good advice to take folic acid or pre-pregnancy vitamins, but it’s really important to have sex at the right time during your cycle. The days leading up to and including the day of ovulation are the only days each cycle when a woman can get pregnant. Unlike basal body temperature (BBT) charting, ovulation predictor kits detect the rise in luteinising hormone (LH test) - a key fertility hormone that rises prior to ovulation - to accurately detect the days BEFORE, and not AFTER ovulation. Test to see if you are pregnant using the Clearblue Ultra Early Pregnancy Test. You can use our early detection pregnancy test from 6 days before your missed period (5 days before you expect your period) (1). Clearblue Ultra Early pregnancy test is ultra-sensitive (test sensitivity 10mIU/ml) - no test can tell you sooner. With the accuracy you expect from Clearblue Pregnancy Tests, this home kit is over 99% accurate from the day you expect your period. (1) ‘Missed period' is the day after you expect your period. 79% of pregnant results can be detected 6 days before the missed period.(2) vs not using any method. To find out if your phone is compatible and if the Clearblue Period & Cycle Tracker app is available in the country you live in, visit: clearblue.com/connectivity #digital #digital ultra early #early detection #clearblue #ovulation test #pregnancy test

Great value if you are trying for a baby: 10 Digital Ovulation Tests and 1 Early Detection Pregnancy Test in the same pack, maximise your chances of getting pregnant

Get pregnant faster (2): at home urine test which pinpoints your 2 most fertile days

Over 99% accurate at detecting the luteinising hormone (LH) surge. Hormones are a more accurate predictor of ovulation than basal body temperature (BBT), which only rises after ovulation

Easy to read: the only brand giving a unique digital ‘smiley face’ when it detects the LH surge in your urine, prior to ovulation

Clearblue Ultra Early Pregnancy Test - results from 6 days before your missed period (5 days before you expect your period) (1)

World’s No. 1 selling brand in home pregnancy and fertility tests. Based on international sales in nearly 20 countries compiled using independent market research data

Providing pregnancy tests, ovulation kits and fertility tests for women for over 35 years

Try our FREE Period & Cycle Tracker app: view where you are in your cycle and see how the probability of peak fertility varies for women with the same cycle length as you. Use Clearblue Ovulation Tests to identify your peak days, based on your hormones

Clearblue Pregnancy Test Ultra Early Triple-Check & Date Combo Pack, 3 Tests (1 Digital, 2 Visual)

3 pregnancy tests for extra reassurance! This pack gives you the opportunity to TRIPLE-check early, and date your pregnancy: it contains 1 Clearblue Pregnancy Test with Weeks Indicator and 2 Clearblue Ultra Early Pregnancy Tests. With the accuracy you expect from Clearblue, the 3 sticks of this home pregnancy test kit are over 99% accurate from the day you expect your period. Use Clearblue Ultra Early Pregnancy Test for results up to 6 days before your missed period (5 days before your expected period) (1). Clearblue Ultra Early is our most sensitive visual pregnancy test (10mIU/ml) - no test can tell you sooner. Clearblue Pregnancy Test with Weeks Indicator is the first and only test that is as accurate as an ultrasound scan at dating pregnancy (2). It also tells you how far along you are – weeks since conception are shown as 1-2, 2-3 or 3+. With this home pregnancy test, you can test 5 days before your missed period (4 days before your expected period) (1). If testing before you expect your period, you must use your first urine of the day for an accurate Weeks Indicator result. Leave a review if you bought the product: your opinion counts! Ratings and reviews help others decide which product to buy.#weeks indicator #early detection #clearblue #pregnancy test

AdditionalAttributes.description:
New Formula Curash Sensitive Fragrance Free baby wipes have been specially formulated to be gentle on baby's sensitive skin.

New Formula Curash Sensitive Fragrance Free Baby Wipes are specially formulated with 99% of the ingredients from natural origin. They are free from perfumes, soap, alcohol and preservatives such as parabens, MI or phenoxyethanol. Dermatologist and Paediatrician tested, they are pH balanced and suitable for sensitive skin. Curash Sensitive Fragrance Free Baby Wipes are soft and gentle for baby, but also thick and strong for you, so you can tackle whatever mess life throws at you.
They are vegan friendly, not tested on animals and also suitable to clean little hands and faces.
Our Sustainability Promise: Curash Baby Wipes packaging sustainability has been improved through recyclable design features, including a new plastic pouch made from 100% polypropylene (PP), plus the Easy Seal lid has been updated to contain 30% post-consumer recycled PP plastic, so both can be recycled where soft plastic recycling facilities exist.
The Curash brand was originally developed by a doctor in Sydney, Australia, and has been caring for baby's skin for over 35 years.

Curash is proud to partner with Tresillian and the Tresillian Parent’s Help Line, to help reach more Aussie parents and support them on their parenting journey.



NEW LOOK NEW FORMULA : Curash Sensitive Fragrance Free Baby Wipes have a great NEW Formula and gorgeous NEW Look packaging, with improved sustainability. The country of origin may vary during the transition.

Free From Fragrance, Parabens, Alcohol, Soap, Methylisothiazolinone (MI), Phenoxyethanol; Yuka Score 100/100

pH Balanced, Soft, Thick and Strong

AdditionalAttributes.description:
NEW Formula Curash Simply Water Baby Wipes contain 99% purified water and have been clinically tested and specially formulated to be gentle on even newborn baby's delicate skin.

NEW Formula Curash Simply Water Baby Wipes contain 99% purified water and are specially formulated with 0% soap, alcohol, MI or parabens. They are Dermatologist and Paediatrician tested to be suitable for even newborns' delicate skin. Curash Simply Water Baby Wipes are thick, soft and strong to make cleanups easy at nappy change time. They are vegan friendly, not tested on animals and also suitable to clean little hands and faces.

Our Sustainability Promise: Curash Baby Wipes packaging sustainability has been improved through recyclable design features, including a new plastic pouch made from 100% polypropylene (PP), plus the Easy Seal lid has been updated to contain 30% post-consumer recycled PP plastic, so both can be recycled where soft plastic recycling facilities exist.


The Curash brand was originally developed by a doctor in Sydney, Australia, and has been caring for baby's skin for over 35 years.

Curash is proud to partner with Tresillian and the Tresillian Parent’s Help Line, to help reach more Aussie parents and support them on their parenting journey.



NEW LOOK NEW FORMULA AVAILABLE NOW: Curash Simply Water Baby Wipes are transitioning to a great NEW Formula and gorgeous NEW Look packaging, with improved sustainability. The country of origin may vary.

Thick, Soft & Strong

Infused with 99.4% water, tooshies Pure Water wipes are perfect for the most sensitive and newborn skin and ensure a gentle clean from head to toe. These wipes are special as they're biodegradable and will compost back into the earth in as little as 60 days.

Our unscented pure water wipe is a pared back option of our best selling aloe vera and chamomile baby wipe. With only a handful of ingredients, we’ve created a water-based baby wipe that can be used on even the most sensitive newborn skin.

These pure baby wipes are infused with 99.4% medical-grade water with a few additional clean, gentle ingredients that keep the wipe safe and clean for your little one.

Unlike some of the water wipes available in Australia and around the world, our water wipes are 100% plastic-free and will compost back into the earth in as little as 60 days.

This convenient single pack of 70 wipes comes with a ‘one hand’ open lid and is a great inclusion in your hospital bag, for use out and about or on-the-go in your car or pram. Try these if you are looking for baby wipes that won’t irritate your little one’s soft, sensitive skin.

99.4% pure water

100% plastic free

Biodegradable and compostable

Unique textured plant based cloth for a pure clean from head to toe

Fragrance free

Hypoallergenic, vegan, not tested on animals

Large one-hand open lid

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Welcome comfort and care with Libra Maternity Extra Long Pads with Wings. Designed to support new mothers during this special time, these pads are infused with Aloe Vera to provide exceptional absorbency and a gentle, soothing touch. Carefully designed with our unique BodyFit shape that moulds to your body for a second skin comfort. Together with the curved wings and extra length, these pads are specially designed to stay in place, providing added security during your postnatal recovery and comfort during a time of great change.


Our pads are designed to fit you during your maternity journey. With Libra Maternity Pads, you can cherish every moment with your new baby, feeling supported, comfortable and reassured. Here's to a smooth postnatal experience where you feel fabulous every step of the way.

Highly absorbent: Specifically designed for post baby, they are extra absorbent and have a top sheet enriched with Aloe Vera for a soothing sensation

Enhanced comfort: The Libra BodyFit Shape is designed to mould to your body's contours and move with your body while you sleep

Extra long with wings: Specially designed, curved wings ensure your pad stays in place while the extra length offers you more coverage so you can focus on your little one

Made to take care of you: Designed to have a soft layer that provides a plush cushiony feeling after giving birth

Embrace the spirit of 'you do you': This 10 pad pack ensures you're covered during your postpartum journey so you can focus on what matters most
